steps.t: Heniawen has asked you to reassure Candron that there is no danger in Pelargir. You should talk to him through the door.
Candron has asked you to scout three places in East Pelargir. He mentioned the district with the destroyed Castamir monument, the top of the stairs ne…
You have scouted all three places in East Pelargir. You should return to Heniawen in East Pelargir and talk to Candron through the door of their home.
You have helped Candron find the courage to leave the house. You should talk to Heniawen in East Pelargir.
